evals.prompt: 帮我生成一张公众号封面图：主题是「AI 改变医疗」，风格是专业科技感，尺寸 900×383，需要有标题文字位置。
evals.expected_output: 图片生成 prompt + 尺寸规格 + 构图建议

evals.prompt: I need a hero image for my SaaS landing page. The product helps remote teams collaborate. Professional but friendly style.
evals.expected_output: Image generation with appropriate style guidance and composition for web hero

evals.prompt: Generate 3 variations of a product thumbnail for my mobile app — clean, modern, shows the app interface.
evals.expected_output: 3 distinct image generation prompts with composition variations
